name: design-system
description: Code-first design system: sync a Claude Design system into design/tokens.css (claude-design-sync), audit code-only drift against design/guardrails.mdx, and query the contract. Figma sync is an OPTIONAL adapter (figma/tokens/sync-to-figma/check-parity).
author: systemix

mcp: The code-first core (claude-design-sync, drift-report) needs no MCP
Figma MCP + Figma Console MCP — OPTIONAL, only for the Figma adapter (figma/tokens/sync-to-figma/check-parity)
